results.title: Jason Blahovec
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist - AI Research and Development at [NRG Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nrg-energy)
...
Accomplished Senior Data Scientist with over 13 years of experience in data and analytics across the energy, retail, and life sciences industries, specializing in the development and deployment of advanced machine learning and NLP solutions. Expertise in building and optimizing data-driven models, with proficiency in both supervised and unsupervised learning techniques. Extensive hands-on experience in ETL processes, cloud computing (AWS, Google Cloud), and distributed computing frameworks such as Apache Spark, as well as data analytics platforms like Databricks. Demonstrated success in leading end-to-end data project life cycles, from data extraction and preprocessing to feature engineering, hyperparameter optimization, and model deployment. Skilled in leveraging cutting-edge technologies, including Generative AI, large language models (LLMs), and tools like Gemini and Langchain, to drive innovation and achieve strategic business objectives. Strong foundation in Python, PySpark, and SQL, with a proven track record of delivering actionable insights and enhancing organizational performance through advanced statistical analysis and data engineering.

results.title: Kyle Stanford
highlights:
Applied AI Engineer at [NRG Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nrg-energy)
...
A dedicated problem-solver and technical leader specializing in applied AI and machine learning solutions for enterprise environments. With deep expertise in NLP, agentic systems, data analysis, automation, LangChain, PyTorch, Python, FastAPI, backend architectures, microservices, and cloud deployment (AWS, Docker), I excel in architecting scalable, high-impact AI systems that drive efficiency and innovation in real estate, finance, defense, and beyond. Committed to rigorous fine-tuning, ethical AI practices, and robust testing, I ensure reliable, transformative outcomes that reduce workloads, enhance accuracy, and unlock actionable insights. Beyond my technical pursuits, I'm a passionate golfer and a lifelong learner, always embracing new challenges in AI and beyond. My unwavering faith and commitment to family ground my professional journey. Let's collaborate to pioneer exceptional AI-driven products.
...
### Applied AI Engineer at [NRG Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nrg-energy) (Current)
...
Led AI innovation as Tech Lead, driving decisions for five AI projects in six months, delivering NLP, automation, agentic, and data analysis solutions revolutionizing real estate and financial processing in enterprise. Architected two NLP2SQL apps from scratch for financial/real estate data, fine-tuning OpenAI’s GPT-4.1 on 830/320 datasets to 95% query-to-SQL accuracy; used Redis and LangChain for queries, carrying majority workload in small team. Built dual-model pipeline for NLP2SQL: Grok for <125k tokens, OpenAI Code Interpreter for larger; cut processing time 40%, enabled dynamic charts and insights. Developed three OPL Agent variants, automating broker responses via SharePoint/Google Drive integration; reduced workload 20%, 98% classification accuracy, handled full workload on keys. Designed IT Help Agent for email support with intent classification/escalation; slashed resolution time 30%, boosted satisfaction 25%, built end-to-end in constrained setting. Created Comp Reviewer using OpenAI Code Interpreter/Salesforce APEX to flag outliers in comps; reviewed 15% deals, improved accuracy 22% via historical analysis. Managed offshore team on Next.js app with TypeScript, MongoDB, real estate APIs; code reviews, PRs, Vercel deploys sped delivery 35%. Orchestrated DevOps for AI projects: Docker, AWS EC2 with FastAPI/Gunicorn/WSGI; 99.9% uptime, 25% faster deploys, managed bulk infrastructure.

I'm excited to announce that I recently trained a GPT-2 language model from scratch for the Kazakh language! This model is now publicly available for use. As you may know, the Kazakh language has a rich history and is spoken by millions of people around the world. However, there are relatively few language models available for Kazakh, which can make it challenging to develop natural language processing applications that work well for this language. That's why I decided to take matters into my own hands and create a GPT-2 model specifically for Kazakh.

Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen

This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities

...

...

...
